headline: Tri Pointe Homes Marks 20,000th Washington Home Sale, Celebrating Over Five Decades of Puget Sound Homebuilding
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., March 25, 2026--Tri Pointe Homes® has sold its 20,000th home in Washington State, marking an achievement in a Pacific Northwest homebuilding legacy that began in 1969 and spans the company’s Quadrant Homes® era under Weyerhaeuser. The milestone sale took place at Alterra in Newcastle, Wash., with returning Tri Pointe customers who previously purchased a home in the company’s Aldea community in 2020.
